description_long: This is a modern, twin-engine jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features two large jet engines mounted on either side of the rear fuselage, with prominent exhaust nozzles. Its wings are mid-mounted and swept, with no visible winglets, and the tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers in a canted arrangement. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is covered by a blue-tinted, enclosed canopy. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, indicating a tricycle configuration.
description: A sleek, twin-engine jet airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a forward blue-tinted cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the twin jet engines, canted twin vertical stabilizers, and swept wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tricycle landing gear, forward cockpit, and angular fuselage profile.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view emphasizing the nose, cockpit canopy, and intake placement on the engines.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, engine placement, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin canted vertical stabilizers in an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose wheel, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single blue-tinted canopy.
